FaBo Local Businesses Plug N Play (Plug &
Play)
Things to have ready before hand:
Have a clear cut offer that you have discussed with your client, never fall into
promising more than he is willing to give and avoid problems by having loose ends.
Have your copy ready, as you saw on the ‘Becoming a Copywriting King’ module you
should already have 2-3 high quality pieces of copy already written out.
Have your images/video ready, they must be original and eye-catching remember
you are trying to make people stop what they are doing.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Creating your campaign:
As we have discussed before, we only use the lead generation objective or
conversion objective nothing else, nothing more. Lead generation for leads inside of
Facebook, conversion optimized for leads when having an external clickfunnels
landing page.
In this case we will create a native leadform inside of Facebook.
1) Go to your ads manager and on the top right corner ‘click’ on create. (green
Button)
2) Select Lead Generation and put a telling name on it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

FaBo Local Businesses Plug N Play (Plug &
Play)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Creating your adset:
Before putting a name on your adset do these steps:
1) Select your clients Facebook Page on the drop down menu. You should have
access to it as a partner.
2) For the audience: Pin your clients brick and mortar business address, you can
type it in or pin it on the map. Go 1-3 miles radius from it, think about how
much are people willing to travel to go to your clients business, if it is a fancy
restaurant you can go for 5-10, if it’s a gym you can go for 1-3 and so on. Make
sure you have more than 50k people on your radius.
3) Only do obvious targeting, there is no need to narrow down, split test and
none of what we consider high level targeting. Only do obvious things and
keep it as broad as possible. With obvious things I am referring to gender and
age, sometimes adding really broad obvious interests. For instance a hair
salon contest should be sent to women, that’s it nothing else nothing more. A
gym you can have a higher budget adset for men and a lower one for women.
Don’t get fancy here.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

FaBo Local Businesses Plug N Play (Plug &
Play)
This is enough targeting
Adding very broad interest that do not narrow audience size sometimes lead to better results.
Beauty is a 1B+ people interest
4) Placements: Only leave ‘ticked’ Facebook and Instagram feed. It is also okay
if you want to leave instagram stories on.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

FaBo Local Businesses Plug N Play (Plug &
Play)
5) Budget, use the budget calculator. Keep in mind you want to give
Facebook enough money to bring you leads. Leads will vary between $1-$25 a
lead. Depends on your niche!
6) Name your adset with a telling name, state the radius you went for, age
range, gender, placements, etc. This will come in handy when reviewing after
a few days.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Creating your ad:
1) Select your clients Facebook and Instagram page.
2) Select ‘Single image or video’.
3) Select your clients image or video.
4) Paste your copy, headline and description.
5) Let the link the same
6) Name your ad in a telling way, describing the image/video and title of your
copy
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Creating your Instant form:
1) Select more volume
2) Use the same headline of the ad
3) State clearly what the offer is about
4) Request email, phone number and name on the form, this will be
automatically filled out by Facebook, as we’ll show on the demo
5) Add your privacy and policy website, you can grab THIS TEMPLATE if you are
in the UK, otherwise you can use this website to generate one:
https://connectio.io/privacy-policy-generator/
6) Fill out the thank you page thanking the customer and reassuring he/she is
now part of the offer.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
